notes: SHIP v1.14.335 - COMMAND v2 (layout + NEXT-U per SPEC-COMMAND-V2-FINAL.md). Turns the Command page into the rack workspace: the phone shows THIS rack, how full it is, where the next node goes, and one violet action button; ingest is one tap when the Master email lands. ALL #pg-cmd-scoped (redesign-only page; never renders under ?legacy -> byte-identical) except the D7 NEXT-U marker (an ADDITIVE MeshBasic emitter, the owner-cleared N-06 class, hero-scoped so the Work/BUILD rack bay is byte-identical). Master pipeline is READ-ONLY. SHIPPED: D6 hero height min(46vh,420px)->clamp(240px,36vh,340px) so Z0-Z4 incl. the NBA button clear the fold on 390x844; D4 hero shows NO view controls - rackElevation_render3D builds no strip for a hero mount (_strip=null; CABLES/VIEW-RAIL/EXPLODE all skip), hero-strip CSS + _heroStrip var/teardown retired; tapping the hero opens the full bay (deploy_showRackDetail for the active-deployment matching rack, else Rack Map floor - never a dead tap), capture-phase pointer tap (<8px travel) so orbit-drag is ignored; D8 Z3 vitals #cc-rackvitals RACKED(n/48U) / OPEN(n U) / BLOCKERS(n, this-rack via active deployment else 0) / NEXT(U##, taps to flash the marker), fed from the same elev cmd_mountRackHero resolves; D7 NEXT-U marker = pulsing cyan strip on the rack front at the lowest open U above the highest populated U (phantom_nextOpenU is ONE source of truth for the marker + the NEXT vital), pulse on the shared bt in bayTick, skipped when the rack tops out; D5 Z1 rack line #cc-rackline (rackId . totalU . device count) taps to a minimal rack-switch picker (_cmdHeroRack override honored by cmd_resolveFirstRackElev); D2 Master-age chip in Z0 (>12h amber, >24h red, never blocking) doubling as the re-ingest/swap door (D11 single door -> cmd_loadMaster); D12 ghost hero (#cc-ghost) removed + status pills merged into the Z0 cluster as dots-with-tooltip (standalone statusrow row between rack and NBA gone); Z4 NBA #cc-nbar restyled to a full-width >=52pt violet button (logic untouched); D10 S0 = #pg-cmd[data-master=0] hides the rack/vitals/nba/grid and shows a full-height ingest zone (whole zone -> cmd_loadMaster). FLAGGED - NOT shipped (owner ruling needed): Z5 grid trim to SCAN.LOG.BLOCKER.HANDOFF would STRAND Shift Report (shiftReport_generate has no second UI door) and possibly Brief, and SCAN/LOG are not in .cmd-grid (they are the hero .hverbs) - executing literally = a No-Silent-Failures stranding, so the existing 8-button .cmd-grid is left fully functional pending a re-home ruling. DEFERRED (low value, reported): Z6 compact stats strip (kept the existing .stats), AWAITING-art relocation into the S0 zone (clean styled zone instead), FLAT-elevation NEXT-U marker (3D is the default hero; FLAT is only the WebGL-fallback). Gates: inline-JS vm.Script compile x3, CSS brace net-0, sw.js ok, version.json valid, three-stamp .334->.335 lockstep; phantom-ship-gate + phantom-rd-reviewer pre-commit. DEVICE-VERIFY (installed PWA, HARD-REFRESH / clear SW first): (1) fresh load no Master -> full-screen INGEST zone only, tap -> file picker; (2) ingest -> lands on the lead rack live-3D, NO view buttons on the hero; (3) NEXT-U pulses at the correct open U and matches the NEXT vital; (4) Z0-Z4 incl. the violet GO button visible with no scroll on iPhone; (5) tap the rack -> full bay with all controls, back returns clean (spin bay, return, spin hero - no GL leak); (6) tap the rack line -> picker -> switching re-mounts the hero; (7) ?legacy=1 pixel-identical. ROLLBACK: revert this commit.
